things.name: Erbil Citadel (Qalat Hewler)
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage mound city continuously inhabited for over 6,000 years

things.name: Kurdistan Textile Museum
things.description: Traditional Kurdish textiles, costumes and weaving techniques in a restored citadel house

things.name: Qaysari Bazaar
things.description: Ancient covered market at the foot of the citadel selling spices, gold and Kurdish crafts

things.name: Sami Abdulrahman Park
things.description: Largest park in Iraqi Kurdistan with fountains, playgrounds and beautiful gardens

things.name: Shanidar Cave
things.description: Cave where Neanderthal remains were found buried with flowers 65,000 years ago

things.name: Minaret Park
things.description: Ottoman minaret park with a lively evening atmosphere and traditional tea houses

things.name: Kurdistan Museum
things.description: Archaeology of the Kurdish homeland from prehistoric times through Islamic culture

things.name: Ankawa District
things.description: Christian neighbourhood with churches, restaurants and Assyrian cultural heritage

things.name: Pirmam Mountain Resort
things.description: Cool mountain resort 45km from Erbil with waterfalls and hiking trails

things.name: Erbil Civilization Museum
things.description: History of the Erbil region from Neolithic times to the Islamic era
